negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg
% SZS output start Proof for neg
2. ! [X0] : (~begins34(X0) => ~from_istanbul(X0)) [input(axiom)]
4. begins35(tom) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0] : (begins35(X0) => ~begins34(X0)) [input(axiom)]
7. ~from_istanbul(tom) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~~from_istanbul(tom) [negated conjecture 7]
9. from_istanbul(tom) [flattening 8]
11. ! [X0] : (~from_istanbul(X0) | begins34(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
12. ! [X0] : (~begins34(X0) | ~begins35(X0)) [ennf transformation 5]
14. ~from_istanbul(X0) | begins34(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
16. begins35(tom) [cnf transformation 4]
17. ~begins35(X0) | ~begins34(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
19. from_istanbul(tom) [cnf transformation 9]
20. begins34(tom) [resolution 14,19]
22. ~begins34(tom) [resolution 17,16]
23. $false [forward subsumption resolution 22,20]
% SZS output end Proof for neg
% Termination reason: Refutation
